title: Items with columns
excerpt: Hi, I tried with below body for API https://api.monday.com/v2 and wondering why it is limited to columns I can select Ex: id, name, state and few others only. I would like to obtain other columns created on my board. Wou…

posts.author: vijendra (vijendra madugula)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I tried with below body for API https://api.monday.com/v2 and wondering why it is limited to columns I can select Ex: id, name, state and few others only. I would like to obtain other columns created on my board. Would some one advise how I can able to obtain remaning columns I have on the board?

{“query”:“{ boards (ids: 563735499) { name state owner { id name } items { id name state }}}”}

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @vijendra and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

In this case, id, name and state are not you columns. They are attributes of your items.

ID: ID of the item
Name: Name of the item
State: State (active, non active)

If you want to get your columns and their values, you can use something like this:

{
  boards(ids: 1234567890) {
    name
    state
    owner {
      id
      name
    }
    items {
      id
      name
      state
      column_values {
        title
        text
        value
      }
    }
  }
}

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: vijendra (vijendra madugula)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Matias appreciate your help, I see the column values.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
